parsed.production_notes: Standard smartphone video recording. Natural lighting, realistic human movements, and natural facial expressions indicate human actors.

characters.appearance: Male in his 20s, slim build, brown complexion. He has short black hair, a short beard, and wears glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Light blue short-sleeve shirt with a subtle pattern, and black pants.

characters.appearance: Female in her 20s, slim build, brown complexion. She has long, straight black hair.
characters.wardrobe: Maroon velvet long-sleeve top with a sweetheart neckline, and blue jeans.

scenes.setting: Outdoors, daytime. Trees and a pink billboard in the background.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A and Character B are sitting closely together outdoors. Character A is holding a smartphone in his hands, looking down at it. Character B is seated to his left, leaning in to look at the phone as well. They are in a park-like setting with green trees visible behind them. A large pink billboard stands in the background. The lighting is bright, natural daylight. Character A speaks, and then Character B speaks while smiling and laughing.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows two people sitting together outdoors, interacting with a smartphone. A large app interface overlay dominates the lower center of the screen, showing pronunciation feedback for the word 'tomato'. Text overlays indicate 'Day 100' for the woman and 'Day 1' for the man. Another text overlay reads 'American accent app' between them. The overall composition blends the live-action footage with prominent digital UI elements. The camera remains static throughout the shot.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Tomato.
Character B says: Tomato.
scenes.on_screen_text:

Day 1
American accent app
Practice My Text
tomato

The video concludes with this static medium shot and the persistent digital overlays.
